title: La mort de Belle
writer: Georges Simenon, Jean Anouilh, Pierre Kast
actors: Jean Desailly, Alexandra Stewart, Monique Mélinand
plot: Stéphane Blanchon, who teaches at the International College, lives a quiet comfortable life in Geneva. He is married to Christine, a cold, dry-hearted woman, and his sentimental life is reduced to zero. One day, Belle Shermann, an...
